sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Position Size = Account Size × f / (Largest Historical Loss). Optimal f derived from historical win/loss distribution. All profits reinvested. Fractional contracts allowed for precise implementation.

source_rule_text: Use fixed fractional position sizing based on optimal f, where profits are always reinvested and fractional contracts can be purchased, to mathematically optimize returns by accounting for the timing of losses versus wins.
